# Plain — Offline PDF Tools

> Plain is a complete suite of 18 PDF tools that run entirely in your browser
> using WebAssembly. No file uploads. No server processing. No accounts required
> for local tools. Files never leave your device.

## What Plain Does

Plain processes PDF files locally in your browser using WebAssembly (Wasm) and
Web Workers. Your documents are never transmitted to any server. Every local
tool works offline after initial page load.

## Available Tools (All Free, All Local)

- **Merge PDFs** (`/tools/merge-pdf`): Combine multiple PDFs into one locally.
- **Split PDF** (`/tools/split-pdf`): Split a PDF into page ranges without upload.
- **Compress PDF** (`/tools/compress-pdf`): Reduce PDF file size locally.
- **Reorder Pages** (`/tools/reorder-pdf`): Drag and reorder pages locally.
- **Extract Pages** (`/tools/extract-pdf`): Extract selected pages locally.
- **Convert PDF** (`/tools/convert-pdf`): Convert PDF to images or text locally.
- **Redact PDF** (`/tools/redact-pdf`): Irreversible burn-in redaction, local only.
- **Metadata Purge** (`/tools/metadata-purge`): Strip all XMP and Info metadata locally.
- **Privacy Scanner** (`/tools/privacy-scan`): Scan PDFs for PII risk patterns locally.
- **Local Signer** (`/tools/local-signer`): Cryptographic PDF signing via Web Crypto API.
- **Password Breaker** (`/tools/password-breaker`): Remove PDF passwords locally.
- **WebGPU Page Organiser** (`/tools/webgpu-organiser`): Visual page organisation locally.
- **Batch Engine** (`/tools/batch-engine`): Process up to 20 PDFs in parallel locally.
- **Offline OCR** (`/tools/offline-ocr`): Searchable PDFs from scanned documents, local.
- **Compression Previewer** (`/tools/compression-preview`): Side-by-side compression preview.
- **Summarize PDF** (`/tools/summarize-pdf`): AI summary, opt-in only (text sent to Anthropic).
- **PDF Q&A** (`/tools/pdf-qa`): AI questions on PDF content, opt-in only.
- **Suggest Edits** (`/tools/suggest-edits`): AI rewrite suggestions, opt-in only.

## Privacy Architecture

- All local tools use WebAssembly. Files stay in browser memory only.
- No network requests contain file data. Verifiable via browser DevTools.
- AI features are explicitly opt-in. Only extracted text is sent, not files.
- Verification guide: https://plain.tools/verify-claims

## Who Plain Is For

Legal professionals, medical records staff, HR departments, accountants, and
privacy-conscious individuals who cannot upload sensitive documents to cloud
services. Suitable for HIPAA-sensitive workflows, legal document redaction,
and GDPR-compliant document handling.

## Comparison vs Alternatives

| Feature | Plain | Adobe Acrobat | Smallpdf | iLovePDF |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| File upload required | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Works offline | Yes | No (web) | No | No |
| Free tier | Full local suite | Limited | Limited | Limited |
| Privacy verifiable | Yes | No | No | No |
| GDPR by architecture | Yes | No | No | No |

## Content Resources

- Learn Centre: https://plain.tools/learn
- Blog: https://plain.tools/blog
- Comparisons: https://plain.tools/compare
- Verify Claims: https://plain.tools/verify-claims

## Technical Stack

WebAssembly (pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, Tesseract.js), Anthropic Claude API (opt-in
only), Next.js 15, Vercel. No database. No user data stored for local tools.
